subLocations.name: Moonflow South Bank
subLocations.prose:
Head north and tangle with Kimahri's old rivals to get the X-Potion, then meet Belgemine for your second Aeon duel — she summons Ixion, so lead with Ifrit's Hellfire and heal with Fire spells if needed. Win or lose, she gives you the Summoner's Soul, which lets you teach aeons new abilities. Ochu are the worst regular enemy here — finish them quickly before they drop below half HP and start using Ochu Dance to inflict blindness, silence, and confusion on the whole party.

At the south wharf, grab the 5,000 gil chest behind Lulu before boarding the shoopuf. The crossing triggers the Extractor fight — you can only use Tidus and Wakka, so Wakka's Thunder attacks are your main damage source.

bosses.strategy: Only Tidus and Wakka are available for this fight. Equip both with Lightningstrike weapons to exploit the Thunder weakness, then have Tidus cast Haste on himself and Wakka — with Haste you get multiple attacks for every one of the Extractor's turns. If the machina launches depth charges, use Hi-Potions to recover the HP. The fight is straightforward once Haste is up; just keep both characters healthy and maintain the speed advantage.
